question.text: Who manages the BSE indices (including Sensex) and NSE indices (including Nifty)?

answer.text: BSE indices are managed by Asia Index Pvt Ltd and NSE indices are managed by NSE Indices Limited
Both BSE and NSE indices are managed by SEBI directly
BSE indices are managed by NSE Indices Limited and vice versa
All Indian indices are managed by a single entity called India Index Services Ltd

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Index management is done by specialized agencies. BSE indices (Sensex, etc.) are managed by Asia Index Pvt Ltd, while NSE indices (Nifty, etc.) are managed by NSE Indices Limited. These agencies handle construction, maintenance, and revision. **The Trap:** Index management is NOT done by SEBI or the exchanges directly. It is outsourced to specialized subsidiaries/entities. **Cross-Exam Context:** Index management entities are factual questions in Series VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** BSE = Asia Index, NSE = NSE Indices Limited. Both are independent of SEBI.
